strengths: ~16 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Founder of GISCollective and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, public talks)
concerns: Current title is Senior/Staff Developer, not Principal or Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product depth; no advanced degree in an AI field
Little evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI strategy at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and platform leadership depth
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure

response.justification: The candidate brings broad, long-tenured engineering experience across many stacks, a founder mindset via GISCollective, and recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the profile reads as a hands-on senior/staff engineer rather than a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products at scale, or a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption, which are central to this Principal Engineer role.
